title: The Enemy Tries to Regain Control
description: On pages 7–10, this part follows Unknown person #1, Children, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6. The central beat is the enemy tries to regain control.
scene: The scene focuses on the enemy tries to regain control, with Unknown person #1, Children, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6 shaping the Punk Hazard finale and the road toward Dressrosa.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: You guys are his expe- riments.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: None of you were ever really sick.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Well, what's gonna happen to us?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: None of you will ever return home.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Hey, when we're all grown up-!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: You wanna be a Fisher- Man?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Don't be stupid- we'll have adventures

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: That's a long way off, though!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: We never imagined anything like that before!!

summary: The Enemy Tries to Regain Control. This part advances the collapse of Caesar’s operation, Law’s leverage over Doflamingo, and the alliance’s next destination.
